description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:24.0.2 image with a docker:dind service and defines the variables IMAGE_DB=postgres:15.2-bullseye, IMAGE_TAG=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG, RELEASE_IMAGE=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest, and SERVICE_NAME=slave-api. Define the stages build, lint, test, release, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs docker build --pull -t $IMAGE_TAG . then docker push $IMAGE_TAG. In the lint stage add a style job (allow_failure) that runs docker compose pull then docker compose run ${SERVICE_NAME} pycodestyle ., and in the test stage add a test job (allow_failure) that runs docker compose pull, docker compose up -d, and then executes a series of docker compose run --rm ${SERVICE_NAME} commands: python manage.py test --verbosity=3, coverage run manage.py test, coverage report, and coverage erase. In the release stage add a release-image job that depends on build, triggers only when Dockerfile changes, and executes docker pull $IMAGE_TAG, docker tag $IMAGE_TAG $RELEASE_IMAGE, and docker push $RELEASE_IMAGE. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that depends on build, runs only on the main branch, targets the production environment, and runs echo "Falta fazer o script de deployment!".
